violations.description: Ensure an element's role supports its ARIA attributes
violations.help: Elements must only use supported ARIA attributes
<dl> elements must only directly contain properly-ordered <dt> and <dd> groups, <script>, <template> or <div> elements

violations.description: Ensure <dt> and <dd> elements are contained by a <dl>
violations.help: <dt> and <dd> elements must be contained by a <dl>

violations.description: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
Ensure the document has a main landmark
violations.help: Document should have one main landmark

violations.description: Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
violations.help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

violations.description: Ensure that lists are structured correctly
violations.help: <ul> and <ol> must only directly contain <li>, <script> or <template> elements
<li> elements must be contained in a <ul> or <ol>

violations.description: Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
violations.help: Interactive controls must not be nested

violations.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
violations.help: Page should contain a level-one heading

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
